title: 明尼蘇達黑警拘捕CNN記者

replies.msg:
What you need to know

The death of an unarmed black man at the hands of a Minneapolis police officer has sparked protests in a number of major US cities.

Four Minneapolis police officers involved in George Floyd's death have been fired -- but Floyd's family say they want murder charges against them.

Protesters in Minneapolis set a police precinct building on fire, and officers have arrested CNN reporter Omar Jimenez and his team.

quote.msg:

replies.msg:
CNN = FAKE NEWS

黑人=犯法

示威=搶超市 燒警局

撐黑人=左膠、弱智

CNN journalist Omar Jimenez has been taken into police custody during a live broadcast at the site of the protests in Minneapolis, after clearly identifying himself to officers.

Jimenez's crew, including a producer and a camera operator, were also placed in handcuffs.
CNN應該會日日唱衰班黑警
